title: Sumerian/Akkadian: Letter from Iddin-Dagan to Suen-illat
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letter from Iddin-Dagan to Suen-illat.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: Letter from Iddin-Dagan to Suen-illat.

translation.text: From 'Letter from Iddin-Dagan to Suen-illat': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
